headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Jabil (JBL) After An 89.9% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering if Jabil at around US$251 per share is still offering value or if the easy money has already been made? This article walks through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. The share price has seen mixed short term moves, with an estimated 1.2% decline over the last week and around 2.7% over the last month, while the 1 year return sits near 89.9% and the 3 year return is around 204.9%. Alongside these moves, investors have been reacting to ongoing coverage of Jabil's...
